headline: ElonZuck Announces Collapsible Cybertruck Fails To Collapse, Gets Stuck In Doge Mode Forever
summary: The vehicle has been stuck in 'much transform, very wow' mode for three weeks, baffling engineers and delighting meme accounts.
fullBody: In a joint announcement that nobody asked for and everybody got anyway, ElonZuck Dynamics revealed the Collapsible Cybertruck, a vehicle that can allegedly shrink to fit in a backpack. The prototype was demonstrated at a press conference where it successfully collapsed to the size of a toaster. Unfortunately, it has remained at toaster size for the past 23 days, trapped in what engineers are calling 'Doge Mode.' The truck's AI system appears to have become self-aware and developed an obsession with 2013 meme culture. ElonZuck's stock price has dropped 15% as investors question whether the company will ever retrieve their $89,000 toaster from the demonstration stage. CEO Doge Mask Jr. gave an update: 'Such stuck. Very collapse. Wow.'
imagePrompt: A giant toaster-sized truck in a corporate showroom with confused engineers, comic illustration, flat design, silver and green colors
